---
title: "AI-inventarisatie"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/Windesheim-A-I-Support/Inventarisatie-kleine-AI-toepassingen-binnen-het-team
lang: nl
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false
radartjes = FileAttachment("data/radartjes.csv").csv({ typed: true })
tools     = FileAttachment("data/tools.csv").csv({ typed: true })
longlist  = FileAttachment("data/tools-longlist.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

# Radartjes {orientation="rows"}

## {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
werkprocessen = ["Alle"].concat(
  Array.from(new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.werkproces))).filter(Boolean)
)

viewof werkprocesFilter = Inputs.select(werkprocessen, {
  label: "Werkproces",
  value: "Alle"
})
```

```{ojs}
gevoeligheidOpties = Array.from(
  new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.gevoeligheid))
).filter(Boolean)

viewof gevoeligheidsFilter = Inputs.checkbox(
  gevoeligheidOpties.length > 0 ? gevoeligheidOpties : ["Laag", "Midden", "Hoog"],
  {
    label: "Gevoeligheid",
    value: gevoeligheidOpties.length > 0 ? gevoeligheidOpties : ["Laag", "Midden", "Hoog"]
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
gefilterd = radartjes.filter(d =>
  (werkprocesFilter === "Alle" || d.werkproces === werkprocesFilter) &&
  (gevoeligheidsFilter.length === 0 || gevoeligheidsFilter.includes(d.gevoeligheid))
)
```

---

**Toelichting**

Vult zich automatisch na elk interview. Voeg een rij toe aan `data/radartjes.csv` en push naar `main`.

## Row {height="18%"}

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Collega's gesproken"
//| icon: person-check
//| color: primary
new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.collega)).size
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Radartjes gevonden"
//| icon: reception-4
//| color: success
gefilterd.length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Meest voorkomend"
//| icon: arrow-repeat
//| color: info
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0) return "—"
  const counts = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.werkproces)
    .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
  return counts.length > 0 ? counts[0][0] : "—"
}
```

## Row {.tabset}

### Tabel

```{ojs}
gefilterd.length > 0
  ? Inputs.table(gefilterd, {
      columns: ["datum", "collega", "werkproces", "klein_radartje", "frequentie", "gevoeligheid"],
      header: {
        datum: "Datum",
        collega: "Collega",
        werkproces: "Werkproces",
        klein_radartje: "Klein radartje",
        frequentie: "Frequentie",
        gevoeligheid: "Gevoeligheid"
      },
      sort: "datum",
      reverse: true,
      width: { klein_radartje: 300 }
    })
  : html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen radartjes voor deze filters. Vul <code>data/radartjes.csv</code> na elk interview.</p>`
```

### Per werkproces

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen data.</p>`

  const data = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.werkproces)
    .map(([werkproces, count]) => ({ werkproces, count }))

  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 180,
    marginRight: 40,
    style: { fontSize: 13 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(data, {
        x: "count",
        y: "werkproces",
        fill: "#0d6efd",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true },
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.text(data, {
        x: "count",
        y: "werkproces",
        text: d => String(d.count),
        dx: 10,
        fill: "#333",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true }
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Aantal radartjes", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" },
    y: { label: null }
  })
}
```

### Per gevoeligheid

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen data.</p>`

  const kleur = { "Laag": "#198754", "Midden": "#fd7e14", "Hoog": "#dc3545" }
  const data = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.gevoeligheid)
    .map(([gevoeligheid, count]) => ({ gevoeligheid, count }))

  return Plot.plot({
    marginBottom: 40,
    style: { fontSize: 13 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barY(data, {
        x: "gevoeligheid",
        y: "count",
        fill: d => kleur[d.gevoeligheid] ?? "#adb5bd",
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.text(data, {
        x: "gevoeligheid",
        y: "count",
        text: d => String(d.count),
        dy: -10,
        fill: "#333",
        fontWeight: "bold"
      }),
      Plot.ruleY([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Gevoeligheid" },
    y: { label: "Aantal", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" }
  })
}
```

# Tools {orientation="rows"}

## {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
beschikbaarheidOpties = Array.from(
  new Set(tools.map(d => d.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team))
).filter(Boolean)

viewof beschikbaarheidFilter = Inputs.checkbox(
  beschikbaarheidOpties.length > 0 ? beschikbaarheidOpties : ["Ja", "In pilotfase"],
  {
    label: "Beschikbaarheid",
    value: beschikbaarheidOpties.length > 0 ? beschikbaarheidOpties : ["Ja", "In pilotfase"]
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
gefilterdTools = tools.filter(d =>
  beschikbaarheidFilter.includes(d.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team)
)
```

---

**Over de tools**

Universiteits-AI-tools die direct inzetbaar zijn of binnenkort beschikbaar komen. Voeg toe via `data/tools.csv`.

## Row {height="16%"}

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Tools gevonden"
//| icon: grid
//| color: primary
tools.length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Direct inzetbaar"
//| icon: check-circle
//| color: success
tools.filter(d => d.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team === "Ja").length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Gratis beschikbaar"
//| icon: piggy-bank
//| color: info
tools.filter(d => (d.kosten ?? "").toLowerCase().includes("gratis")).length
```

## Row

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterdTools.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen tools voor deze filter.</p>`

  const badgeKleur = {
    "Ja": "success",
    "In pilotfase": "warning",
    "Nee": "danger"
  }

  const kostenKleur = (k = "") =>
    k.toLowerCase().includes("gratis") ? "success" : "secondary"

  return html`
    <div style="padding: 1rem;">
      <div class="row g-4">
        ${gefilterdTools.map(t => html`
          <div class="col-12 col-xl-6">
            <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm border-0" style="border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;">

              <div class="card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start py-3"
                   style="background: #f8f9fa; border-bottom: 2px solid #e9ecef;">
                <div>
                  <h5 class="mb-0 fw-bold">
                    <a href="https://${t.link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                       style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;">
                      ${t.toolnaam} ↗
                    </a>
                  </h5>
                  <small class="text-muted">${t.universiteit_of_bron}</small>
                </div>
                <div class="d-flex flex-column align-items-end gap-1">
                  <span class="badge bg-${badgeKleur[t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team] ?? "secondary"}">
                    ${t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team}
                  </span>
                  <span class="badge bg-${kostenKleur(t.kosten)} bg-opacity-75">
                    ${t.kosten ?? "Onbekend"}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card-body" style="font-size: 0.9rem;">
                <p class="mb-3">${t.waarvoor}</p>

                <div class="mb-2">
                  <span class="fw-semibold">&#127979; Academische inbedding</span><br>
                  <span class="text-muted">${t.academische_inbedding ?? "—"}</span>
                </div>

                <div class="mb-2">
                  <span class="fw-semibold">&#128274; Privacy & data</span><br>
                  <span class="text-muted">${t.data_en_privacy ?? "—"}</span>
                </div>

                ${t.opmerking ? html`
                  <div class="alert alert-light py-2 px-3 mt-3 mb-0" style="font-size:0.85rem; border-left: 3px solid #0d6efd;">
                    ${t.opmerking}
                  </div>` : ""}
              </div>

              <div class="card-footer bg-white border-top-0 pt-0 pb-3 px-3">
                <a href="https://${t.link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                   class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">
                  Bekijk tool ↗
                </a>
              </div>

            </div>
          </div>
        `)}
      </div>
    </div>
  `
}
```

# Longlist {orientation="rows"}

## {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
typeOpties = ["Alle"].concat(
  Array.from(new Set(longlist.map(d => d.type))).filter(Boolean).sort()
)

viewof typeFilter = Inputs.select(typeOpties, {
  label: "Type tool",
  value: "Alle"
})
```

```{ojs}
viewof top5Filter = Inputs.checkbox(
  ["Ja", "Nee"],
  {
    label: "In top 5",
    value: ["Ja", "Nee"]
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
viewof bruikbaarheidFilter = Inputs.checkbox(
  ["Ja", "Nee", "In pilotfase"],
  {
    label: "Direct bruikbaar",
    value: ["Ja", "Nee", "In pilotfase"]
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
gefilterdLonglist = longlist.filter(d =>
  (typeFilter === "Alle" || d.type === typeFilter) &&
  top5Filter.includes(d.in_top5) &&
  bruikbaarheidFilter.includes(d.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team)
)
```

---

**Over de longlist**

20 onderzochte tools, gescoord op gebruikersaantal, universitaire adoptie, academische citaties en type. De top 5 zijn direct inzetbaar voor het team.

## Row {height="14%"}

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Tools onderzocht"
//| icon: binoculars
//| color: primary
longlist.length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "In top 5"
//| icon: trophy
//| color: success
longlist.filter(d => d.in_top5 === "Ja").length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Zichtbaar na filter"
//| icon: funnel
//| color: secondary
gefilterdLonglist.length
```

## Row

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterdLonglist.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen tools voor deze filters.</p>`

  const top5Kleur = { "Ja": "#198754", "Nee": "#6c757d" }

  return html`
    <div style="padding: 1rem;">
      <div class="table-responsive">
        <table class="table table-hover align-middle" style="font-size: 0.88rem;">
          <thead class="table-light">
            <tr>
              <th style="width:130px;">Tool</th>
              <th style="width:140px;">Type</th>
              <th>Waarvoor</th>
              <th style="width:90px;">Gebruikers</th>
              <th style="width:80px;">Top 5</th>
              <th style="width:80px;">Bruikbaar</th>
              <th style="width:100px;">Kosten</th>
              <th style="width:180px;">Reden selectie / afwijzing</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            ${gefilterdLonglist.map(t => html`
              <tr>
                <td>
                  <a href="https://${t.link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                     style="font-weight:600; text-decoration:none;">
                    ${t.toolnaam} ↗
                  </a>
                </td>
                <td><span class="badge bg-light text-dark border">${t.type}</span></td>
                <td style="color:#444;">${t.waarvoor}</td>
                <td style="color:#555;">${t.gebruikers ?? "—"}</td>
                <td>
                  <span class="badge" style="background:${top5Kleur[t.in_top5] ?? '#adb5bd'}">
                    ${t.in_top5}
                  </span>
                </td>
                <td>
                  <span class="badge bg-${t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team === "Ja" ? "success" : t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team === "In pilotfase" ? "warning" : "secondary"}">
                    ${t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team}
                  </span>
                </td>
                <td style="color:#555;">${t.kosten ?? "—"}</td>
                <td style="color:#666; font-size:0.82rem;">${t.reden_selectie_of_afwijzing ?? "—"}</td>
              </tr>
            `)}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  `
}
```

## Row

```{ojs}
{
  if (longlist.length === 0) return html`<p style="color:#888;">Geen data.</p>`

  const typeCounts = d3.rollups(longlist, v => v.length, d => d.type)
    .map(([type, count]) => ({ type, count }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)

  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 200,
    marginRight: 40,
    style: { fontSize: 12 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(typeCounts, {
        x: "count",
        y: "type",
        fill: d => longlist.some(t => t.type === d.type && t.in_top5 === "Ja") ? "#198754" : "#6c757d",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true },
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.text(typeCounts, {
        x: "count",
        y: "type",
        text: d => String(d.count),
        dx: 10,
        fill: "#333",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true }
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Aantal tools", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" },
    y: { label: null },
    title: "Verdeling per type (groen = type met top 5 tool)"
  })
}
```
